title: Lead Apple
description: New apples with unusual effects, compatible with Create, Mekanism and Ad Astra
body:
Lead Apple will add several new apples with custom effects to the game. The idea of the mod is that, depending on the mods in your build, you will discover new apples. Inspired by lead and other apples from the [Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntm).

> ### There is apples for:
> - Vanilla minecraft
> - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod
> - [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
> - [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)

<details>
<summary>Content</summary>

**Vanilla**
- Iron apple- it is a projectile. Makes **BONK**;
- Copper apple- small positive effects;
- Burnt apple- It is bad as food, but it can be used as fuel in the oven.
  
**Create**
- Brass Apple- made in Mechanical Mixer, gives positive effects;
- Zinc apple- made in Mechanical Mixer, it gives small advantages.

**Mekanism**
- Lead apple- made in the combiner. Applies the effect of lead poisoning;
- Uranium apple- it has the effect of radiation sickness. The sound after eating is heard from afar *GHRRRRRRR*;
- Osmium apple- it gives small positive effects;
- Tin apple- allows you to feel the effect of tin heaviness.

**Ad Astra**
- Desh apple- It is created from moon ore, gives the effect of levitation.

</details>

> ### It is planned to add:
> 1. Compatible with the potato cannon from Create;
> 1. More apples, compatibility with other mods (mb Ad Astra, Farmer's Delight or Create:TFMG);

_Made using MCreator_
